integrity.description: The agent actually executed the R script to generate the outputs.

integrity.description: The network visualization appears to be genuinely generated by R.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'airport_network.png' looks like a standard R plot (e.g., base R igraph plot or ggraph), rather than a generic stock image of a network downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The CSV files were generated programmatically, not manually typed.
